name: orizu
description: Eval-first LLM optimization workflows powered by the Orizu CLI: collect human feedback, build evals, score runs, and optimize prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Eval-first LLM optimization with the Orizu CLI
interface.longDescription: Teaches your coding agent the Orizu workflow: upload datasets, collect human feedback, turn feedback into evals and LLM judges, score prompt versions, and run prompt optimization. The plugin is a thin distribution layer over the Orizu CLI runtime; install the CLI with `npm i -g orizu` and authenticate with `orizu login`.
defaultPrompt: Use Orizu to set up evals for this repo.
Use Orizu to optimize my prompt against our evals.
